item.title: Version 1.0.12
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.12 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * feat: add categories and filtering to the plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/84 * feat: add battery charge limit plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/86 * feat: support launch at startup by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/87 * fix: fix make run error by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/88 * feat: add stage manager plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/89 * [codex] 添加 IP 检测插件 by @Chen-DaYi in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/85
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.10...v1.0.12
